name: TC3 — Resend OTP dispatches a new code and stays on verification
description: Verifies that clicking Resend OTP dispatches a new code while remaining on the verification page.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that clicking Resend OTP dispatches a new code while remaining on the verification page.

testStage.description: Verifies that clicking Resend OTP dispatches a new code while remaining on the verification page.

steps.name: Step 1 — Verifies that clicking Resend OTP dispatches a new code while remaining on the verification page
Step 2 — Navigate to login page and submit credentials
Step 3 — Verify OTP page is loaded
Step 4 — Click Resend OTP and verify page stays on verification
